title: iPhone 15 announced by Apple
text: The highly anticipated iPhone 15 is finally here, featuring a USB-C connector and a titanium frame.

title: Apple iPhone 15 launch event
text: At today's event, Apple unveiled the iPhone 15 lineup, moving away from Lightning to USB-C.

title: Stocks fall sharply on inflation data
text: Markets took a hit today as the latest inflation report spooked investors globally.

title: Global markets down amid inflation worries
text: A massive sell-off in global stock markets occurred today due to rising inflation concerns.

title: Quantum computing breakthrough
text: A major leap forward in quantum computing was announced by researchers today.

title: Researchers make quantum leap
text: A new paper details a significant advancement in the field of quantum computing.
